requirements.summary: Remove any hard-coded maximum cap on the number of goals a user can add in the Vision Board section, allowing unlimited goals to be created.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can add more goals than any previously enforced limit in the Vision Board section
No error message, disabled state, or UI block appears when trying to add additional goals beyond any former cap
Existing goals are unaffected after the limit is removed
The 'Add Goal' button remains functional regardless of how many goals already exist

file_operations.description: Remove any hard-coded limit on the number of vision board goals that can be created. Search for and eliminate any conditional logic that disables the 'Add Goal' button, shows error messages, or prevents goal creation based on the current number of goals. Ensure the button remains enabled and functional regardless of how many goals already exist. Verify that no maxGoals constant or similar variable is being used to cap the goal count in this component.
